title: The Next Lord of the Rings Deluxe Edition Book Is Available to Preorder Now
Today's Best Deals: Switch 2 Consoles, Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection, and a Batman Omnibus
description: Plus, save on Adidas Gift Cards, a TCG deck box, and plenty more.

title: The Mandalorian and Grogu’s 4K Steelbook Is Up for Preorder – Here’s Where To Buy It
description: The Mandalorian and Grogu’s 4K steelbook, Collector's Edition, and standard 4K and Blu-rays are now available to preorder. Here's where you can buy them ahead of their release on August 25.

title: The Terminator: How Makinarium’s Master Prop Makers Are Bringing an Iconic Part of the T-800 Back to Life
description: Makinarium and Pinewood Studios prop makers reveal the T-800 Optics, an exclusive hand-finished Terminator collectible limited to just 800 pieces worldwide.

title: The X-Files LEGO Set Has Gillian Anderson Snapping on a Pair of Latex Gloves Once More
description: X-Files star Gillian Anderson has unveiled the series' long-awaited LEGO set, which goes on sale next month priced $200.

title: Corsair Gaming Headsets Score Massive New Discounts at Amazon UK
description: Amazon UK is discounting popular Corsair gaming headsets, dropping the VOID v2 wireless to £89.99 and the HS65 SURROUND wired headset to just £72.78.

title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 on PS5 Is a Couple Dollars Less Than Its Prime Day Price Right Now at Amazon
description: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 on PS5 has dropped to a new low price of $37.49 at Amazon with the help of a coupon, but this offer only lasts until July 27.

title: Preorders Are Live for the LEGO Architecture Tower Bridge Set – Here’s Where You Can Grab It
description: The new LEGO Architecture Tower Bridge set is now available to preorder from a variety of retailers. Here's where you can order it for $349.99 ahead of its August 1 release.
